plot outline: A chance encounter between a travelling salesman and a lonely hitman triggers a strangely profound relationship which provokes each to act in ways neither would have imagined possible. Fate steps in to form a friendship between two men from irreconcilable worlds that will alter the lives of both forever.
title: The Matador
akas: The matador - Même les tueurs ont besoin d'amis (France)

production companies.name: Equity Pictures Medienfonds GmbH & Co. KG II
